arts.ttl: Nico Williams 'key target' for Mikel Arteta but Arsenal suffer Matheus Cunha transfer blow
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta received good and bad news relating to his hunt for a proven striker in the upcoming summer transfer window. The Spanish international still remains a key target according to GIVEMESPORT who also claim from sources that Arsenal are wary of Williams' demands.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal register interest in “quality” PL star who’s held talks with Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly registered an interest in the potential transfer of Wolves forward and Manchester United target Matheus Cunha. The Red Devils are already said to have held positive talks with Cunha’s camp, so it could be tricky for other clubs to win the race for his signature now. arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal & Liverpool still want €80m star after January transfer window talks
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are understood to still be keen on a potential transfer swoop for Nottingham Forest centre-back Murillo this summer. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Murillo is attracting strong interest this summer from a host of top clubs. arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Nico Williams update as Chelsea prepare €50m offer
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly preparing a €50 million offer for Como winger Assane Diao in a deal that could boost Arsenal ’s chances of landing Nico Williams . The Spanish outlet claims that Chelsea view Diao as a “promising prospect” and they are reportedly expected to intensify their pursuit ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window as they continue to search for the best young talents in world football.

arts.ttl: 'The right path': Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a £6m talent in their ranks who's truly 'fantastic to work with'

Oliver Glasner’s side cross the capital for this game sitting 12th in the table, meaning their season rests on the German’s ability to navigate a way past Villa on the weekend to set up a third-ever FA Cup final against either Manchester City or Nottingham Forest. Gabriel Martinelli has scored more Premier League goals against Crystal Palace (6 in 9 games) than he has against any other side.

arts.ttl: What needs to happen in Arsenal vs Crystal Palace for Liverpool to win Premier League TONIGHT
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool are closing in on being crowned Premier League champions and the title could be theirs before they step onto the pitch for their 34th league match

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta set to make drastic Arsenal decision before PSG as Bukayo Saka plan revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal players will have some extra days off after Wednesday night's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace as they look to prepare for next week's Champions League semi-final first leg against Paris Saint-Germain. "Especially because of where some other players are coming [back from] and the amount of minutes that they can play, but it's good to have a little gap, because we are really short in numbers."
